title: kyllinga brevifolia var. gracillima
intro: Kyllinga brevifolia var. gracillima, also known as the gracile flat sedge, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Kyllinga brevifolia var. gracillima include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
